title: Petface Latex Loofas Soft Chew Dog Toy - One Supplied, Colour May Vary
features: ONE SUPPLIED: Keep your furry friend entertained with this soft chew toy, designed for enjoyable play and training sessions
FEATURES: Made of soft latex material perfect for your dog’s chewing needs, includes a built-in squeaker for extra fun
BENEFITS: Promotes healthy chewing behaviour and provides mental stimulation during playtime activities
VARIETY: Colour may vary so each purchase brings a delightful surprise - add to your pup's toy collection today!

KEEPING SAFE: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘Chew’ Damage. Please supervise your pet with this toy, and examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding accessories, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cat and wild birds for great affordable products! Petface Latex Loofas Dog Toy Petface Latex Loofas Toy is ideal for interactive play and will provide your dog or puppy with exercise and fun. Dogs are playful by nature and this toy is perfect for younger or older dogs as the soft latex is not too tough for them to play with. Available in a range of designs. Receive either a red or yellow fun toy! Petface Latex Loofas Dog Toy You'd be BARKING mad not to! Made with a durable latex material designed to be chewed and complete with a squeaker inside will make this latex fruit irresistible to your pooch and keep them busy and mentally stimulated. The ulti-MUTT toy! Dogs are playful by nature and this toy is perfect for younger dogs or older dogs as the soft latex is not too tough for them to play with A super CUTE and fun toy for any dog! The Petface Latex Loofas toys will provide hours of fun for your pooch. With a range of designs available, this toy is perfect for both small and large dogs alike.
